categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
categories.precondition: App launched and on any primary screen
abstract_steps: Identify the target screen's parent category (main library / file browser / settings / about)
Use the primary bottom navigation to switch to that category
Drill down via lists, sub-tabs, or directory entries to reach the target
failure_modes: Tapping a similar-looking icon for the wrong app/tab
Mistaking a sort/filter icon for the overflow menu
Believing target exists in a section where it doesn't
verification_checklist: Breadcrumb or active tab indicator matches the target
Expected section headers or content visible

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: On a list/browser where new entries can be created (playlist, favorite, server, stream)
abstract_steps: Trigger the 'add' action from an overflow menu or per-row context menu
Select sub-type if applicable (protocol, target list)
Focus the input field by tapping it
Type the required text
Dismiss keyboard if it covers the confirm button
Confirm via OK / enter / list selection
failure_modes: Typing before the input is focused
Confirm button hidden behind keyboard
Using a favorites-style entry that lacks the add option
verification_checklist: Dialog dismisses without error
New entry visible in its containing list
Re-opening source context menu shows 'Remove' instead of 'Add'

categories.name: DELETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Entry exists in a managed list (favorite, playlist, history)
abstract_steps: Open the entry's context menu via three-dot / long-press
Choose the remove/clear action
Confirm in any subsequent dialog
failure_modes: Confusing a toggle (enable/disable saving) with an actual clear/delete
Operating on the wrong row due to imprecise tap
verification_checklist: Entry no longer appears in list
Confirmation toast or dialog dismissal

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
abstract_steps: Navigate to the settings/preferences area
Locate the specific entry (scroll or use sub-categories)
Tap to open its selection dialog or toggle its checkbox
Choose the desired value
failure_modes: Setting located in a sub-category rather than main settings
Dependent setting being greyed out until parent is enabled
Accidentally toggling instead of opening details
verification_checklist: Subtitle/value reflects the new choice
Checkbox state matches intent

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: App provides the requested info in a visible UI area
abstract_steps: Navigate to the most likely informational area (About, properties, folder listing)
Scroll if necessary
Tap on aggregated values (e.g. version label) if a details popup is expected
Read the value and report it
failure_modes: Searching settings for info that's only on an About page
Reporting a count without scrolling through full list
Missing horizontally-scrollable items
verification_checklist: Information matches exact format requested
All scrollable content checked
Answer derived from currently visible UI state

categories.name: SEARCH
categories.precondition: On a list view supporting search
abstract_steps: Activate the search affordance
Type the query string
If scoped, broaden to global/all results via the provided button
Inspect results or empty-state message
failure_modes: Forgetting to broaden scope when query targets the whole library
Searching in the wrong sub-tab
verification_checklist: Query string visible in the search bar
Results list or 'no results' message displayed

categories.name: SORT_OR_FILTER
abstract_steps: Open sort/filter menu
Choose desired criterion
Re-open menu to verify arrow direction; tap again to toggle order if needed
failure_modes: Desired criterion unavailable on current sub-tab
Confusing display-layout overflow with sort menu
verification_checklist: Selected criterion highlighted with arrow
List visibly reorders if items present

categories.name: TRIGGER_ACTION
categories.precondition: Inside a container offering bulk actions (play all, scan, refresh)
abstract_steps: Locate the appropriate action affordance (FAB, overflow item, context menu)
Invoke it
Confirm any subsequent prompt
failure_modes: Action affordance hidden in a different mode (e.g. search view)
Invoking action on empty container produces no visible feedback
verification_checklist: Toast/dialog or state change confirms action
For playback: media player view opens or audio starts

categories.name: LAUNCH_APP
categories.precondition: Device on home screen or app drawer
abstract_steps: If icon not on home, open app drawer
Scroll alphabetically to the target letter
Tap the correct icon, verifying its distinctive logo
Dismiss any first-run permission dialogs
failure_modes: Tapping a different app with a similarly colored icon
Permission dialog blocking subsequent interactions
verification_checklist: App's main screen visible
Bottom navigation/tabs of the intended app present
